summary: Frontend testing of new Camp features: GEAR tab (GearPanel with Paperdoll/Inventory/Forge), SEASON PASS (BattlePassPanel with 40 nodes), and CODEX (CodexPanel with Enemies/Bosses/Weapons). All 16 requested features verified working.

issues: BP track is horizontal single row — on small viewport nodes overflow and require horizontal scroll. Not a bug but UX note.

seed_data_creation: Used localStorage wds.save.v1 with tutorialDone:true, introSeen:true, profile.xp:1400, gearInventory:[], battlePass.claimed:[]
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 features verified: (1) Camp loads no errors ✅, (2) GEAR tab found in sidebar ✅, (3) GearPanel has PAPERDOLL/INVENTORY/FORGE tabs ✅, (4) Paperdoll shows all 7 slots (helmet,chest,arms,legs,boots,ring,amulet) ✅, (5) SEASON PASS tab opens BattlePassPanel ✅, (6) 40 BP nodes rendered ✅, (7) With XP=1400 nodes 0-6 all CLAIMABLE ✅, (8) Claiming node 0 works (class changes to claimed) ✅, (9) CODEX tab opens CodexPanel ✅, (10) Codex tabs ENEMIES/BOSSES/WEAPONS all found ✅, (11) Undiscovered entries show ??? ✅, (12) + Grant Item debug button works ✅, (13) Granted item appears in inventory ✅, (14) Equip button works, toast shows 'Equipped: ...' ✅, (15) FORGE shows merge group when 3 same items ✅, (16) META still works showing locked items ✅. NOTE: localStorage needs both tutorialDone AND introSeen set to true to reach camp directly.
